title: Barclay, Steve - Secretary of State, Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs - ACOBA advice
body: "The Rt Hon Steve Barclay MP left his role at the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs in July 2024  The Rt Hon Steve Barclay MP sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with BPP Holdings Limited.The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up in March 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
